SurveyResult.title: Survey Result
SurveyResult.description: Stores the results of a user's habitat discovery survey.

userId.description: The UID of the user who took the survey.

userName.description: The name provided by the user.

inhabitants.description: Number of people living in the apartment.

answers.description: The user's answers to the survey questions.

scores.description: The calculated scores for each profile.

dominantProfile.description: The profile with the highest score.

clientReport.description: The aspirational report generated for the client.

architectReport.description: The technical report generated for the architect.
